steps.title: Use the contrast word
steps.content: The underlined sentence reports a newspaper's view that English people should be free to look and act as they like. The next sentence begins with "But," showing the author turns away from that view.

steps.title: Reject wrong functions
steps.content: A says the sentence supports the author, but the contrast shows disagreement. B shifts attention to whether critiques are fair. C claims the text is about changing opinions over time, which is not the function here. The answer is D.
